title: nepeta linearis
intro: Nepeta linearis, also known as blue catmint, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Nepeta linearis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, calm anxiety and insomnia, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
